susinstantswap.description: One keypress to grab what you want!
susinstantswap.config.allow_swap_with_em: Allow Swap With Empty Slot In Survival Mode
susinstantswap.message.adapter_reminder: §e[SusInstantSwap] Please install adapters for all installed backpack mods, otherwise you may encounter issues.
susinstantswap.message.empty_slot_blocke: §c[SusInstantSwap] Cannot swap: the hovered slot is empty.
